headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 8, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees dominated the Texas Rangers 9-2, with Ezequiel Duran leading the Rangers' offense with a home run and 2 RBIs. The Washington Nationals secured a 7-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Keibert Ruiz leading the offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. The Cleveland Guardians took down the Kansas City Royals 8-5, with Bo Naylor contributing 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, impacting their team's availability. Jasson Domínguez has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder AC joint sprain. Luis Campusano is out with a left toe fracture, while Joe Musgrove has been transferred to the 60-day injured list. Roman Anthony is on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 5, 2026, with a right wrist sprain. Chris Devenski has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to an undisclosed illness. Matthew Boyd is out with a left meniscus injury, and Emilio Pagán is on the 15-day injured list with a left hamstring strain.

The Chicago Cubs have acquired right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson in a trade with the Athletics. The Tampa Bay Rays traded RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash, while the Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Trevor Richards to the Chicago White Sox for cash. The Atlanta Braves traded C Jonah Heim to the Athletics for cash, and the Washington Nationals traded 3B Zack Short to the Detroit Tigers for cash.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Rangers 9-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Texas Rangers, winning 9-2 behind a strong team effort. Ezequiel Duran led the Rangers' offense with a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Twins 7-5**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a 7-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Keibert Ruiz leading the offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. Taylor Rogers pitched 1.2 scoreless innings for the Twins, striking out 2 batters.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Royals 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-5 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Bo Naylor leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. Cade Smith earned the save, while Slade Cecconi was credited with the win.

top_news.title: **Cubs Cruise Past Reds 8-3**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing an 8-3 victory behind a strong performance from their pitching staff. Michael Conforto led the Reds' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 2-RBI effort.

top_news.title: **Yankees Place Jasson Domínguez on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: New York Yankees left fielder Jasson Domínguez has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder AC joint sprain.

top_news.title: **Ferguson Joins Cubs Roster**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs have acquired right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson in a trade. The Athletics traded Ferguson to the Cubs.
